data.content_ref: inline:{"standard": {"mode": "absolute", "rubric": "A historical-mechanism account must: (1) name a specific causal mechanism \u2014 an institution, incentive, or process \u2014 not a mood, essence, or inevitability; (2) state forbidden cases that are concrete observations which could realistically have obtained (a record, an event, a datable pattern); (3) claims of the form 'decline was inevitable' or 'moral decay' with no mechanism violate this standard.", "spec": "std-hist"}}
